item.title: Kim Kardashian, Lewis Hamilton romance grows; Kanye West reacts
item.summary: Kim Kardashian seemingly confirmed her relationship with Formula 1 star Lewis Hamilton by sharing a video of them together after their Tokyo trip. Reports claim Hamilton also spent time with her children. Meanwhile, Kanye West is said to have reacted calmly, reportedly respecting Hamilton and trusting him around the kids, a stark contrast to his past public feud with Pete Davidson.
